en: Come here. All right. I need an update.
Update on what? An update on these little field trips that you've been taking with Mike.
I told you already. We pick up money, check on things, stuff like that.
And you're his bodyguard, right? What? What?
ko: 그리고 네가 그의 경호원이란 거지? 뭐? 뭐?

en: That's what you said. I said I guarded him.
Like backup. Like a second set of eyes. Everybody needs backup, right?
And this has to be you.
It can't be, I don't know, Tyrus or any of the couple dozen muscle heads that Gus has
ko: 타이러스나 구스가 고용한 근육질 친구들 중 한 명이 될 수는 없어.

en: working for him. It has to be Jesse Pinkman. Why?
ko: 그가 고용한 친구들 중 한 명이 될 수는 없어.

en: What, is there something about you that I don't know? Are you a former Navy SEAL?
ko: 뭐, 네게 내가 모르는 뭔가가 있어?

en: Do you have to have your hands registered as lethal weapons? Register this.
ko: 너의 손이 치명적인 무기로 등록되어야 해? 이걸 등록해.

en: All I'm saying is that do you not even question this?
ko: 내가 하는 말은, 이걸 의심조차 하지 않니?

en: Do you really believe that you mean anything to these people?
ko: 정말로 이 사람들이 너에게 의미가 있다고 믿니?

en: And I'm not trying to be insulting. I'm just trying to make you see things clearly.
ko: 나는 모욕하려는 게 아니야, 그냥 네가 상황을 명확히 보게 하고 싶어.
